focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
【金融新闻】Cathie Wood buys $22.8 million of surging tech stock
【中国新闻】伊朗革命卫队称警告射击一违规船只 霍尔木兹海峡暂时关闭
【世界新闻】Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed 'until further notice'

items.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
items.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company sai

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

items.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
items.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: 伊朗革命卫队称警告射击一违规船只 霍尔木兹海峡暂时关闭
items.summary: 当地时间12日凌晨，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军发布声明称，对霍尔木兹海峡内一艘船只进行警告射击。

items.title: 委内瑞拉强震遇难人数上升至4333人
items.summary: 当地时间11日，委内瑞拉全国代表大会主席豪尔赫·罗德里格斯召开新闻发布会，通报该国日前发生的强震遇难人数已上升至4333人。此外，地震造成16740人受伤，发生余震超过1200次。(总台记者 宫祥诚 廖开迪)

items.title: 消息人士：阿曼提议“双航道”管理霍尔木兹海峡船只通行
items.summary: 总台记者7月11日获悉，据阿曼外交部消息，阿曼、伊朗双方已同意继续在技术和政治层面开展磋商。

items.title: 美伊停火面临考验 以方认为新行动窗口正出现
items.summary: 总台记者观察丨美伊停火面临考验 以方认为新行动窗口正出现

items.title: 伊朗代表称若美继续违反其义务 伊将不再遵守谅解备忘录
items.summary: 当地时间11日，伊朗常驻联合国代表伊拉瓦尼警告称，如果美国继续违反其义务，伊朗将不再遵守与美国签署的谅解备忘录。(总台记者 江浩宇)

items.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed 'until further notice'
items.summary: The IRGC says it fired a warning shot at a vessel in the strait and is warning the US not to respond with "aggression".

items.title: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
items.summary: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.

items.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
items.summary: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.

items.title: China's second typhoon in a week makes landfall
items.summary: Nearly two million people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.

items.title: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
items.summary: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.
